name: Porch Group, Inc.
business: Porch Group, Inc. is a homeowners insurance company that combines insurance with home warranty and offers software-as-a-service (SaaS) to home services companies. It serves homeowners and homebuyers by providing insurance, warranty, moving services, and a platform for home inspectors, title companies, and mortgage providers.

exposures.sentence: Porch Group, Inc., together with its consolidated subsidiaries, ( Porch, the Company, we, our, us ) is a new kind of homeowners insurance company one designed to stand out in a massive and growing market of more than $100 billion.

Our strategy is built on three differentiators that set us apart. 1. Advantaged Underwriting Through Proprietary Data Leveraging unique property insights, we can assess risk with greater precision, enabling competitive pricing for low-risk customers and avoiding high-risk customers, while delivering superior underwriting performance. 2. Best Services for Homebuyers We are committed to being the go-to partner during one of life s most significant transitions buying a home by offering services that simplify moving and home setup. 3. More Protection We combine homeowners insurance with home warranty, filling coverage gaps and reducing unexpected costs for consumers.

Beyond insurance, Porch is a leader in the home software-as-a-service ( SaaS ) space, serving approximately 24 thousand companies across industries essential to the home-buying process home inspectors, title companies, mortgage providers, and more.

catalysts.event: Formation of Porch Reciprocal Exchange and sale of Homeowners of America to the Reciprocal
catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, we completed the formation of Porch Reciprocal Exchange (the Reciprocal ) and, as part of this process, sold our legacy homeowners insurance carrier, Homeowners of America ( HOA ), to the Reciprocal.

catalysts.event: Captive reinsurer begins providing reinsurance coverage for non-catastrophic weather quota share
catalysts.sentence: Effective April 1, 2025, our captive reinsurer provides reinsurance coverage for the Reciprocal for risks with low earnings volatility, such as non-catastrophic weather quota share.

tamClaims.sentence: Porch Group, Inc., together with its consolidated subsidiaries, ( Porch, the Company, we, our, us ) is a new kind of homeowners insurance company one designed to stand out in a massive and growing market of more than $100 billion.
